name: Chocolate-Peanut No-Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the corn flakes into 2 1/2 cups and set aside.
2. Place the chocolate chips, peanut butter chips, and shortening in a medium microwave-safe bowl.
3. Microwave on high (full power) for 1-2 minutes. The mixture should be smooth when stirred.
4. Add the crushed corn flakes and raisins to the bowl. Stir until everything is well coated.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper, covering a baking sheet.
6. Cover with plastic wrap and chill until firm.
7. Store at room temperature in a tightly covered container.
